/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++11  -g -O3 -Wall -O3 -Wall  -shared -Wl,-soname,libphy_simulator_lib.so -o /root/epsilon/devel/lib/libphy_simulator_lib.so CMakeFiles/phy_simulator_lib.dir/src/phy_simulator/arena_loader.cc.o CMakeFiles/phy_simulator_lib.dir/src/phy_simulator/phy_simulator.cc.o -Wl,-rpath,/root/epsilon/devel/lib /root/epsilon/devel/lib/libhkust_pl_vehicle_model.so /root/epsilon/devel/lib/libhkust_pl_common.so -ldw -lglog -lprotobuf /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.3.2.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.3.2.0 /root/epsilon/devel/lib/libhkust_pl_ooqp_itf.so /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpgensparse.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpsparse.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpgondzio.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libooqpbase.a /root/epsilon/src/EPSILON/core/common/thirdparty/ooqp/lib/libma27.a -lblas -lgfortran
